chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 89 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1039/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.1040/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 26.10.2023 Mr. Waseem Ahmed Sundrani, Advocate for applicant/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. It is stated that applicant Baqir Ali S/o Zulfiqar Ali, Golo by caste, is accused in Reference No.12 of 2016 at serial No.13 of the list of accused; that he was in Saudi Arabia and not aware about the pendency of this Reference, and he has recently returned to Pakistan and surrendered before this Court for seeking protection to appear before the Accountability Court along with an application U/S 498 CrPC to prove his innocence. However, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrant has been issued against him. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 26.10.2023 to 01.11.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrant in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period, in which Cr. Bail App. No. D – 89 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 applicant is directed to surrender before the Court concerned. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

D – 89 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 applicant is directed to surrender before the Court concerned. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case applicant fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
